title: rubus × rigens
intro: Rubus × rigens, also known as the thimbleberry, is a hybrid plant species that is a cross between the Rubus argutus and the Rubus parviflorus. The thimbleberry plant is valued for its medicinal properties, particularly its high content of salicylic acid, which is similar to aspirin. The health benefits of Rubus × rigens include its ability to reduce inflammation and alleviate pain, as well as its potential to lower blood pressure and improve cardiovascular health. The herbal preparations of thimbleberry include teas, tinctures, and salves, which can be used to soothe skin irritations and promote wound healing.
